endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.ResourceHealth/emergingIssues
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.ResourceHealth/emergingIssues/{issueName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{ISSUENAME}} with a real issuename.

endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.ResourceHealth/operations
endpoints.description: Lists available operations for the resourcehealth resource provider
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.ResourceHealth/availabilityStatuses
endpoints.description: Lists the current availability status for all the resources in the subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.ResourceHealth/events
endpoints.description: Lists current service health events in the subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ResourceHealth/availabilityStatuses
endpoints.description: Lists the current availability status for all the resources in the resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /{resourceUri}/providers/Microsoft.ResourceHealth/availabilityStatuses
endpoints.description: Lists all historical availability transitions and impacting events for a single resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCEURI}} with a real resourceuri.

endpoints.name: GET /{resourceUri}/providers/Microsoft.ResourceHealth/availabilityStatuses/current
endpoints.description: Gets current availability status for a single resource
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCEURI}} with a real resourceuri.

endpoints.name: GET /{resourceUri}/providers/Microsoft.ResourceHealth/events
endpoints.description: Lists current service health events for given resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{RESOURCEURI}} with a real resourceuri.
